query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "sciatlas: a large-scale knowledge graph for automated scientific resea" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it applies the same core mechanism (constructing a large-scale knowledge graph from scientific literature using LLMs) to a specific domain (astronomy) to study the same dependent variables (quantifying driving forces and interdisciplinary discovery) that the user's question implies for the "SciAtlas" framework. It serves as a canonical domain-specific application and empirical baseline for extending the "SciAtlas" methodology to other scientific field
